# Michael Pfarrhofer

> Assistant Professor at the Department of Economics, WU Vienna University of
> Economics and Business. Research in econometrics for macroeconomic and related
> applications: Bayesian methods, time series, machine learning, business cycle
> analysis and forecasting.

Michael Pfarrhofer is also an Expert for the Joint Research Centre (JRC) Ispra
of the European Commission and an Associate Editor of Macroeconomic Dynamics.
His work has appeared in the Journal of Econometrics, Journal of Business &
Economic Statistics, Journal of Applied Econometrics, International Economic
Review, European Economic Review, and the International Journal of Forecasting,
among others.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mpfarrho.github.io/): bio and curriculum vitae
- [Research](https://mpfarrho.github.io/research/): working papers and full publication list
- [Project 18765](https://mpfarrho.github.io/project18765/): OeNB Jubiläumsfonds project on Bayesian nonparametric inference under measurement errors and outliers
- [Legal notice](https://mpfarrho.github.io/legal/): imprint (§5 ECG / §25 MedienG) and privacy policy
